title: Cybernetics: Cyberchems
description: Adds cyberchems to my Cybernetics mod! Augment your biology with chemistry!!!
body:
This is an addon mod for Cybernetics, by me, Perigrine3. 
It adds 6 Cyberchemical modifiers to enhance your gameplay, and unravel your mind! 

ROID - Enhances speed, strength, and size while effect is active. 

STIM - Enhances speed, and provides scaling chance to dodge damage, capping at 90%. 

BLACK LACE - Increases durability, and grants an immunity to wither, but obscures health bar. When the effect wears off, the player will have occasional bouts of wither. 

IMMUNOBOOST - Negates all negative effects at the cost of humanity. Does not pair well with cybernetics. 

WARP - Immediately teleports the player somewhere randomly within a 64x64 grid. 



Roid, Stim, and Black Lace have a 10% chance to incur addiction when used. Addiction is an effect that makes the user shaky, weak, and incapable of fighting. It cannot be cleared through normal means. To clear Addiction you will need to either wait 7 in game days, or use:

ADDICTOL - Makes the user weak, nauseous, and incapable of fighting for a full day, but when the effect clears, it takes the Addiction effect with it. 

Addiction will also change the behavior of Villagers. 




I don't plan to update this often, it will mostly just be bug fixes. I do not plan to add more. You can suggest more cyberchems, but I likely will not add them.
